topic: Rewrite the /interface:* commands to be literal self-contained design prompts like the Anthropic frontend-design skill and Open Design, which is the deliverable the operator originally asked for. The 012/002-research-design-commands research authored literal prompt templates but the build shipped thin routers plus a shared creation-contract. Deliver concrete literal-prompt command bodies plus the runtime include or shared-fragment mechanism, reconciling literal-prompt richness with the anti-duplication authority split where commands own intake and modes own taste.
